allow: PowerShell($installer = "$env:TEMP\\DockerDesktopInstaller.exe"; Write-Host "Descargando Docker Desktop \(~600 MB\)..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://desktop.docker.com/win/main/amd64/Docker%20Desktop%20Installer.exe" -OutFile $installer -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Descarga completada: $\(\(Get-Item $installer\).Length / 1MB -as [int]\) MB")
